data.change_summary: Restored token usage and cache efficiency metrics across all backends. Extended TokenCounts with cache_read_tokens and cache_creation_tokens fields. Added ClaudeUsage struct with serde aliases to parse Claude CLI envelope usage (input_tokens/tokens_in, output_tokens/tokens_out, cache_read_input_tokens/cached_in, cache_creation_input_tokens). Added extract_codex_usage_from_stdout() that scans NDJSON lines in reverse for the last usage event with cached_input_tokens. Extended OpenRouterUsage with cache_read_input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, and prompt_tokens_details for OpenAI-style cached_tokens. Added structured tracing::info! event in service.rs after invocation metadata finalization with all token fields, presence booleans, and session_reused flag. Fixed stub_backend struct literal for new fields.
outstanding_risks: Claude CLI envelope format assumption: if Claude CLI changes its usage field structure, the ClaudeUsage struct may need updating. Serde aliases provide some resilience.
Codex CLI NDJSON format assumption: the extraction scans for any JSON line with a 'usage' object. If Codex changes its event format, the scanner may need adjustment.
tracing::info! uses -1 sentinel for missing token counts; downstream log consumers must handle this convention.

steps.description: Extended TokenCounts struct in model.rs with cache_read_tokens: Option<u32> and cache_creation_tokens: Option<u32>
Added ClaudeUsage struct with serde aliases (tokens_in, tokens_out, cached_in) and usage: Option<ClaudeUsage> field to ClaudeEnvelope in process_backend.rs
Wired Claude envelope usage into TokenCounts in the Claude decoder path, replacing TokenCounts::default()
Added extract_codex_usage_from_stdout() function that scans NDJSON stdout in reverse for last usage event with input_tokens, output_tokens, cached_input_tokens
Wired Codex usage extraction into the Codex decoder path, replacing TokenCounts::default()

Extended OpenRouterUsage with cache_read_input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, and PromptTokensDetails struct; mapped cache_read_tokens from Anthropic native or OpenAI prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens
Fixed stub_backend.rs struct literal to include cache_read_tokens: None, cache_creation_tokens: None

Added structured tracing::info! event in service.rs after metadata finalization with invocation_id, backend, model, attempt, duration_ms, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, tokens_reported, cache_reported, session_reused

Added unit tests: Claude envelope with usage, without usage (backward compat), with field aliases; Codex NDJSON extraction, empty stdout, last-event selection, skipping non-usage lines; OpenRouter Anthropic cache fields, OpenAI prompt_tokens_details, missing cache fields

validation_evidence: cargo clippy -- -D warnings: clean, no warnings
cargo fmt --check: clean, no formatting issues
Claude envelope with usage test: validates input_tokens=100, output_tokens=50, cache_read_input_tokens=80, cache_creation_input_tokens=20
Claude envelope without usage test: validates backward compat deserialization with no usage field
Claude envelope alias test: validates tokens_in/tokens_out/cached_in aliases
Codex NDJSON extraction test: validates prompt=500, completion=120, total=620, cache_read=300 from turn.completed event
Codex empty stdout test: validates TokenCounts::default() returned
Codex last-event test: validates second usage event (600/200/400) picked over first (100/10/50)
OpenRouter Anthropic cache fields test: validates cache_read_input_tokens=80, cache_creation_input_tokens=20
OpenRouter OpenAI prompt_tokens_details test: validates cached_tokens=60 from nested details
OpenRouter missing cache fields test: validates backward compat with only standard 3 fields
